creator: amdmi3@amdmi3.ru
text:
* Anish Mistry (amistry@am-productions.biz) wrote:
> You need to have a built kernel.
> cd /usr/src && make buildkernel KERNCONF=HADES && \
> cd /usr/ports/sysutils/fusefs-kmod && make install clean
That helped, thanks. Maybe it should be mentioned in the port somehow,
better with check for built kernel added...

-- 
Best regards,
  Dmitry Marakasov               mailto:amdmi3@amdmi3.ru
